prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 1019→931→665→503→805，整体呈前移后回落的波动走势；2024 年新高考首年位次大幅前移至 503，2025 年回落至 805，近两年波动幅度较大，2025 年基准约 805 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 60 人→2022 年 55 人→2023 年 44 人→2024 年 48 人→2025 年 52 人，呈先缩后扩趋势；2026 年物理类 26 人加医学类 27 人（均要求物理+化学），合计 53 人，较 2025 年 52 人微扩约 1.9%，扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（A+）2024–2025 年专业热度为高热推荐，计算机类持续高热，电子信息/通信为高热推荐；本省 2026 年考生总数约 39.2 万（较 2025 年增约 3.3%），物理类估算约 26.9 万人，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 805、2026 年计划微扩约 1.9%、本省物理类考生增加约 3.3%、学校顶尖层次及王牌工科专业持续高热等因素，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧；预测最低位次约 829 名，区间 729–929 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1019→931→665→503→805, showing a fluctuating trend of moving forward and then falling back; in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination, the ranking moved significantly forward to 503, then fell back to 805 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years, and the 2025 baseline is about 805; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 60 in 2021→55 in 2022→44 in 2023→48 in 2024→52 in 2025, showing a trend of first shrinking and then expanding; in 2026, the physics category has 26 students plus the medical category has 27 students (both require physics + chemistry), totaling 53 students, a slight expansion of about 1.9% compared to 52 in 2025, with a very small expansion rate, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 10th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, with a strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring students; from 2025 to 2026, no significant negative events were found in the reputation documents for Xi'an Jiaotong University, with overall reputation stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention; no records of enrollment gaps in recent years; it has 4 A+ disciplines: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering, as well as 9 A/A- disciplines including Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering, with a total of 13 disciplines at A- or above, outstanding engineering strength, and strong appeal to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (A+) was a high-heat recommended major in 2024–2025, Computer Science remains consistently high-heat, and Electronic Information/Communication is a high-heat recommendation; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 392,000 (an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025), with the physics category estimated at about 269,000 people, and the expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 805, a slight expansion of about 1.9% in the 2026 plan, an increase of about 3.3% in provincial physics category examinees, the top-tier level of the school, and the sustained high popularity of its flagship engineering majors, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 829, with a range of 729–929.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 617→562→534→488→602, showing a fluctuating trend of moving forward then falling back; in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance exam, the ranking moved forward to 488, then fell back to 602 in 2025, with significant fluctuations in the past two years, and the baseline for 2025 is about 602nd place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 5 students in 2021→6 in 2022→9 in 2023→12 in 2024→13 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 9 students, a reduction of about 30.8% compared to 13 in 2025, a significant contraction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science rankings for many years, belonging to the top-tier universities in the country, and also attractive to liberal arts candidates; its reputation remained stable from 2025 to 2026, with no significant negative incidents; it ranks 24th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with overall attention at an upper-middle level; Marxism Theory is rated A, Business Administration is rated A, and Law (corresponding to the Law Experimental Class) is not individually rated but is a advantageous direction of the school; the liberal arts majors are few (Liberal Arts Experimental Class, Law Experimental Class, and Network and New Media), with limited subject evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major is recommended (relatively hot), and Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; the estimated number of history category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 123,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 119,000 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 602 in 2025, a significant enrollment reduction of about 30.8% in 2026, an increase of about 3.3% in provincial history category candidates, the top-tier level of the school, and the high popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be significantly fiercer than in 2025, with rankings moving forward notably; the predicted minimum ranking is about 476th, with a range of 419–533.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家『985工程』『211工程』重点建设高校，入选『双一流』建设高校名单。作为C9联盟成员，学校综合实力雄厚，医学部历史悠 久，临床医学、基础医学等学科积淀深厚，在西北地区乃至全国享有极高声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等专业尤其受考生青睐。西安交通大学医学部位于陕西省西安市，虽非广西本地高校，但作为顶尖9 85高校，对广西考生仍有较强吸引力。2026年医学类在广西招生27人，规模适中，其中新增独立招生的口腔医学专业（3人）和临床医学专业（10人），专业设置更加细化，可能 吸引更多高分考生报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素，预测2026年西安交通大学医学类在广西壮族自治区的最低录取位次约为6224名，波动区间为5914至6534名。与2025年6442名相比，位次略有上升（数字减小）， 主要受招生计划小幅缩减及医学类专业持续热度影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region over the past five years (2021-2025) are: 11,424 in 2021, 6,810 in 2023, 3,219 in 2024, and 6,442 in 2025 (2022 data missing). Total planned enrollment for medical programs each year: 30 in 2021, 30 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 28 in 2025. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 27, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a reduction of about 3.6%, which is a slight decrease. Looking at the ranking trend, from 2021 to 2024, rankings continued to rise (numbers decreasing), indicating increasing competition year by year, but in 2025, there was a significant drop, with rankings falling from 3,219 to 6,442, reflecting a cooling of application enthusiasm that year. With a slight reduction in the 2026 plan, rankings are expected to rise slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. As a member of the C9 League, the university has strong comprehensive strength, with a long history in its medical department and deep积淀 in disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine, enjoying a very high reputation in the northwest region and even nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have maintained high application enthusiasm nationwide in recent years, with programs like clinical medicine and stomatology particularly favored by candidates. Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical department is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province. Although not a local university in Guangxi, as a top 985 university, it still has strong appeal to Guangxi candidates. In 2026, the medical programs will enroll 27 students in Guangxi, a moderate scale, with newly independently enrolled stomatology (3 students) and clinical medicine (10 students) programs, making the program offerings more detailed, which may attract more high-scoring candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical programs in Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region in 2026 will be approximately 6,224, with a fluctuation range of 5,914 to 6,534. Compared to the 2025 ranking of 6,442, the ranking is expected to rise slightly (number decreasing), mainly due to the slight reduction in enrollment plan and the sustained popularity of medical programs.
